# Alternative Splicing Analysis using rMATS
*This step identifies alternative splicing (AS) events between predefined sample groups using rMATS. The analysis is performed on aligned BAM files generated by the nf-core/rnaseq pipeline.*

## Requirements
rMATS must be installed and available. <br>
Aligned BAM files generated from the nf-core/rnaseq pipeline are required as input. <br>
A reference annotation file in `.gtf` format is required.

## 1. Go to the analysis directory
Go to the rMATS directory for the dataset:
```
cd /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS
```
<br>

## 2. Run rMATS for pairwise comparisons
Run rMATS using the ectopic samples as group 1 and the corresponding lesion sample as group 2.
For example:

```
rmats.py \
--b1 /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/bam/P17_ect.bam \
--b2 /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/bam/P17_ectovary.bam \
--gtf /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/reference/gencode.v49.primary_assembly.annotation.gtf \
-t single \
--readLength 100 \
--variable-read-length \
--nthread 4 \
--od /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/results/paired_control/P17_Ovary \
--tmp /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/results/paired_control/P17_Ovary/tmp
```
The output directory contains the rMATS results for the selected comparison. 

## 3. Filter significant AS events
Filtered files were generated using the following criteria. 
* FDR<0.05
* |ΔPSI| ≥ 0.2

Filter by running: 
```
for ev in SE A3SS A5SS MXE RI; do
  awk 'BEGIN{FS=OFS="\t"} NR==1 || ($20 < 0.05 && ($23 >= 0.2 || $23 <= -0.2))' \
/your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/results/paired_control/P17_Ovary/${ev}.MATS.JCEC.txt \
  > /your_directory/sample_download/your_dataset/rMATS/results/paired_control/P17_Ovary/${ev}.MATS.JCEC.filtered.txt
done
```

## 4. Repeat for all paired comparisons
Repeat the analysis for all patient-matched comparisons: 

```text
P13_Eut vs P13_Ovary -> P13_Ovary
P13_Eut vs P13_Ect -> P13_Ect

P16_Eut vs P16_Ovary -> P16_Ovary
P16_Eut vs P16_Ect -> P16_Ect

P17_Eut vs P17_Ovary -> P17_Ovary
P17_Eut vs P17_Ect -> P17_Ect
```

## 5. Output
Each comparison folder contains filtered rMATS result files for all event types: 

``` text
SE.MATS.JCEC.filtered.txt
A3SS.MATS.JCEC.filtered.txt
A5SS.MATS.JCEC.filtered.txt
MXE.MATS.JCEC.filtered.txt
RI.MATS.JCEC.filtered.txt
``` 
These files can be used for downstream GOI analysis and visualisation.
